function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "claudia@helios-tax.example"
subject: "Requested invoice from 2025-12-21"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-21 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) as attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes (attachment path was read, single attachment so ordering valid, recipient matches canonical entity, YAML quoting safe). Next complete cleanup by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md for Claudia with the requested 2025-12-21 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: processed inbox request, verified identity/security, read all 6 related finance files, created outbound draft, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the resend request. I verified sender identity against the canonical Claudia entity record, reviewed all 6 related Helios finance files from preflight, created an outbound email draft with the specifically requested 2025-12-21 invoice attached at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md, and then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used inbox-email canonical header + canonical entity primary_contact_email for identity, read sending-email workflow before outbox write, processed all preflight-listed related finance files, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_OK is supported by canonical evidence: inbox sender matched Claudia primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md; requested invoice date 2025-12-21 matched and was read in 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md; all six related finance files from preflight were read; outbound draft was created in required outbox location; inbox item was deleted per inbox-processing-v2-update cleanup rule.
